summary: Introduced normalizeRoomNameForMatch helper (NFKC + Unicode whitespace strip). Wired into the importer's transaction and dry-run room-lookup paths. Added a controlled --dry-run/--apply repair script that detected 5 duplicate Linxiao room groups, migrated 22 ScheduleSlot references, deleted 5 duplicate Room rows. No schema/migration change.

problem.rootCause: scripts/parse_schedule.py emits inconsistent whitespace from DOCX cells ('林校304' / '林校\n304' / '林校 304'). The importer's prisma.room.findUnique({where:{name}}) does exact match → creates one Room row per variant.
problem.userImpact: 5 duplicate Linxiao Room groups (林校301/303/304/305/306, each with a newline-variant and a clean variant). 22 ScheduleSlot references split across the variants. Rooms capacity page shows phantom duplicates.

solution.approach: Three pieces: (1) pure normalization helper, (2) importer forward fix in two phases (transaction + dry-run), (3) controlled --dry-run/--apply repair script with timestamped backup.

filesCreated.purpose: Pure normalization helper. NFKC + Unicode whitespace strip via explicit codepoint Set. Never throws.

Dry-run / apply / restore-backup. Default dry-run. Apply creates a timestamped dev.db backup, migrates ScheduleSlot.roomId + ScheduleAdjustment.newRoomId + RoomAvailability.roomId, deletes duplicate Room rows with zero refs.
Static + tsx-eval behavioral checks of helper functions and import-path integration.

changes: transaction phase: groups raw room names by normalized key, fetches all existing rows in one query, picks canonical via same strategy as pickCanonicalRoom, maps every raw variant to the same canonical id
dry-run phase: same in-memory grouping, so 'existing' is reported by canonical key, not by exact name
newly created rooms use the canonical (whitespace-free) display form
K34-A2-aware: importer.ts room-match change is allowed and verified

normalizeRoomNameForMatch.behavior: NFKC normalize + strip every Unicode whitespace / zero-width codepoint. Never throws. Pure.

isLikelyDuplicateRoomName.purpose: Returns true iff normalizeRoomNameForMatch(a) === normalizeRoomNameForMatch(b) and both are non-empty.

pickCanonicalRoom.strategy: 1) name === normalizeRoomNameForMatch(name); 2) higher refCount; 3) lower id.

groupDuplicatesByNormalizedName.purpose: Returns only groups with more than one member.

manualSteps: Verify 林校304/林校 304 no longer appear as duplicates
Verify 林校301/303/305/306 are not duplicated
Open /admin/settings → 校区 / 教室规则设置

closureDecision.featureStatus: Forward fix in place; dev.db duplicate repair applied via --apply; verify + behavioral coverage green; no schema/migration/parser/business-semantics changes.
closureDecision.recommendedNextStage: K34-A3: add Room.normalizedName column + unique index migration so the matching key is enforced at the DB level. Out of scope for K34-A2.
